parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ instances: [{ prompt: $json.image_prompt }], parameters: { sampleCount: 1, aspectRatio: '1:1', personGeneration: 'DONT_ALLOW' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ platform: $json.platform, content: $json.caption, media: $json.image_base64 ? [{ type: 'image', data: $json.image_base64 }] : [] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO campaign_posts (campaign_id, day_number, post_type, caption, platforms, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, blotato_post_id, status) VALUES ('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000', 0, 'manual', $1, $2, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_TIME, $3, 'posted')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', message: 'Posts publicados en ' + $('Adapt Captions').first().json.platforms.length + ' plataformas', platforms: $('Adapt Captions').first().json.platforms }) }}
